programmes.show_description: The team pursues an Amber Alert during New Year's Eve; Carisi faces Counselor Rafael Barba in the courtroom.
After a sexual assault investigation is stalled for months, a woman puts her accusations against a popular athlete on a billboard.
Benson investigates a police officer's accusations of sexual assault. Meanwhile, Captain Tucker's retirement party ends in tragedy.
Torres receives intel from a confidential informant regarding top secret naval information that's at risk of being sold.
A pipe bomb explodes in a brownstone, and Shaw and Riley must identify the intended target: a controversial author or a fertility doctor.
Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Caged: US crime drama series. McGee becomes a hostage inside a women's prison when a riot erupts following the murder of a guard.
Broken Bird: Crime drama. Ducky is attacked at a crime scene by an Afghan woman who claims he killed her brother. The investigation unearths a dark secret from the ME's past.
Love and War: US crime drama. A navy captain is murdered and disemboweled in what appears to be a case of international espionage.
The wife of a once-popular crooner is shot dead.
Myth of Fingerprints: Van Buren is disturbed when the brother of a man she helped convict claims that someone else was the real killer.
When an apartment block is torched, Briscoe and Green take on the task of identifying the charred remains of a young woman caught in the blaze.
When a private detective is found dead, Briscoe and Green realise that any one of the people he was investigating could be to blame.
When the wife of a defence lawyer is found dead in her car, Briscoe and Green investigate the possibility that she was not the intended target.
A murder victim is revealed as a doctor who had been writing fraudulent prescriptions for the painkiller oxycodone.
Reunion: Drama series following the US Navy's dedicated federal agency. The team discovers that the murder of a Marine may be linked to their past. Gibbs decides Ziva's fate.
US crime drama. Gibbs and the team must reopen a closed case when a blogger with a reputation for exposing government cover-ups is murdered.
Good Cop, Bad Cop: US crime drama. The discovery of a dead marine off the coast of Tanzania unearths a shocking case of foul play on board a Jordanian freighter.
Frank's esteem for an old friend proves to be a mistake, while Jamie asks Erin for help apprehending a perp who shot at him. Eddie clashes with her new boss.
Frank takes to heart Jamie's case involving the suspicious death of his friend's wife. Erin gets an unsolved robbery case that's impossible to crack without Anthony's help.
The squad investigates a potentially violent situation stemming from a role-play session on a camming website when one user decides to meet his idol in person.
Carisi faces a powerful judge when he inexplicably dismisses a case involving a university student's rape.
Crime drama series. Kat goes overboard when she follows up on her suspicions about a trainer at her boxing gym.
Rollins goes undercover to investigate a government worker who is dealing green cards in exchange for sex
Detectives Goren and Eames encounter a gang of high-class criminals led by a dangerous European who befriends, robs and kills tourists.
Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed "Sketchy."
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Deliverance: Naval crime drama. The murder of a marine leads the agents into the murky world of gang violence. Gibbs is forced to confront a mystery from his past.
Bounce: US crime drama series. Tony takes charge of the team as he reopens a case he investigated three years earlier.
South by Southwest: US crime drama. When a fellow agent is murdered, the team heads into the desert to find a woman who may hold the key to the mystery.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an uninvited nightclub guest who, before being shot, had confronted a famous musician.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a black publishing executive.
Crime drama series. When a priest is murdered, Briscoe and Green seek a suspect with a grudge against God but it turns out that the clergyman was not the intended target.
A former soldier goes on trial for killing a Yemeni man he suspected of being a terrorist.
Powerful American drama about the investigation and prosecution of crime. Briscoe and Green are on the hunt for a murderer who shot and killed two professors.
Briscoe and Green uncover a murderous love triangle involving a scorned teenager and her lover.
Code of Conduct: Crime drama series. A Marine recently returned from Afghanistan is found dead in his car in what appears to be a case of suicide.
Outlaws and In-Laws: Crime drama series. Gibbs investigates whether his mentor was involved with the deaths of two soldiers in an internationally delicate incident.
Endgame: Crime drama series. When an assassin returns to threaten the safety of Vance's family, the team helps Vance to face up to his troubled past.
Reese is forced to revisit his past when the Machine produces the number of a computer analyst who seems to be stealing confidential information.
Shaw escapes her captors, but the team is unsure of her mental state when she begins to act paranoid and reckless.
